pending_confirmation.notes: pendingConfirmation is checked before running/manual completion so stale running lifecycle state cannot show manual completion or duplicate ready submission controls.

manual_completion.visible_when: status running, transitionAuthority user-confirmation, no pendingConfirmation, no blockedStatus, no blockedReason
manual_completion.notes: Manual completion remains a user override that submits manual_complete only after the dialog confirmation.

blocked.notes: blockedStatus alone is sufficient to show recovery controls even when lifecycle status remains running.

unable.notes: unable uses the same recovery-only path and does not expose advancement controls.

failed.notes: Existing failed completion-check recovery behavior is preserved.

status_panel.pending_priority: pendingConfirmation displays Waiting for confirmation over stale running status

tests_run.summary: 1 test file passed; 48 tests passed. Existing React act() warnings from WorkflowTemplateEditor tests were emitted but did not fail the run.

risks: Pre-existing unrelated edits were present in WorkflowComponents.test.tsx, WorkflowStatusPanel.tsx, desktop/src/types/session.ts, and locale files before this worker started; this worker did not revert them.
No browser smoke screenshot was added because the required component test command covered the requested state matrix.
notes: No server files, package/config files, tasks.md, implementation-matrix.md, or localStorage repair paths were changed.
The pending branch remains first in WorkflowTransitionControls to prevent stale running status from overriding pendingConfirmation.
Blocked and unable states now key off blockedStatus as well as failed status and blockedReason, exposing retry-only recovery controls.
Status panel recommended skill evidence remains visible under workflow details.
